title: task
description: Policy: appendix-c-safety.md. Add _Nonnull/_Nullable to pointer params and returns in public headers. Catches null bugs at compile time.
close_reason:
Fixed: Added _Nonnull/_Nullable annotations to core public headers

Headers updated:
- link_ctx.h: All 8 function signatures annotated
- link.h: All 5 functions + lichen_frame.payload + lichen_link_rx_ctx struct fields
- replay.h: All 5 functions (including return type for lichen_replay_get)
- schnorr48.h: All 6 functions including inline clamp_scalar
- l2_payload.h: Both inline functions with nullable parameters
- oscore.h: All 15 functions including context create/free/protect/unprotect
- edhoc.h: All 10 functions for initiator/responder
- schc.h: All 3 functions
- link_schc.h: Both inline wrapper functions
- announce.h: Struct fields, typedef, and all 5 functions

Compatibility macro added to each header. Follow-up bead project-LICHEN-f632 filed for remaining headers.
